title: Optical-path folding-element with an extended two degree of freedom rotation range
abstract: Actuators for rotating an optical-path-folding-element with two, first and second, degrees of freedom in an extended rotation range around two respective rotation axes, folded cameras including such actuators and dual-cameras including a folded camera as above together with an upright camera.
claims: 1. A mobile device, comprising: a screen; an upright Wide camera having a first field-of-view (FOV1) and comprising a Wide image sensor, wherein the upright Wide camera is configured to provide a Wide image with a Wide image resolution; and a folded Tele camera having a second field-of-view (FOV2) and comprising a zoom lens having a variable focal length, a light folding element having a reflection surface, and a Tele image sensor, wherein FOV2<FOV1, wherein the reflection surface is configured to receive light from a first direction and to redirect the light to a second direction that is different from the first direction, and wherein the reflection surface has an angle α with the screen that fulfils α≤35 degrees.
